    		{{$v.ID}} {{$v.Version.Index}} {{$v.Spec.Name}} {{range $kk,$vv:=$v.Spec.Labels}}{{$kk}}: {{$vv}}

    {{range $kk,$vv:=$v.Spec.Driver.Options}}{{$kk}}: {{$vv}}
